meta.description: HAUNT CTRL v3 yard layout — compiled from Google Earth measurement screenshots

coordinate_system.x_axis: Width of property. 0 = left yard edge, increases rightward, ~35 = driveway edge
coordinate_system.y_axis: Depth of property. 0 = sidewalk/street edge, increases moving back toward porch/house
coordinate_system.origin: Front-left corner of yard where left edge meets sidewalk

displays.name: Interactive Witch
displays.notes: Left side of yard in the graveyard scene, near left planting bed. Measured 22 ft west of jamboree at heading ~102°.

displays.name: Singing Pumpkins (Jamboree)
displays.notes: Table at the garage corner on the driveway edge. Faces the driveway so visitors hear it on approach. Measured 23 ft from witch at heading ~332°.

displays.name: Rear Ghost Projection Screen
displays.notes: Deep in the yard on the OPPOSITE side from the witch (right side), ~29 ft from jamboree. Position approximate — owner confirmed right side; exact spot flexible pending projector throw testing.

audio_analysis.explanation: 23 ft between the interactive witch (z3) and singing pumpkins (z1, garage table) is nearly identical to the original 22 ft placement — the move improves scene layout and visitor flow but does NOT meaningfully reduce audio bleed. Sound drops ~6 dB per doubling of distance; at 23 ft the pumpkins remain only ~10-12 dB down at the witch's microphone. The garage table position does aim the speakers toward the driveway (away from the witch) and puts landscaping between them, which helps somewhat, but ducking is still required.

recommendation.trigger: Duck z1 by 8 dB whenever the witch speaks, listens, or is triggered (manual fire or witch timer). Restore z1 30 seconds after witch activity ends.
recommendation.note: The server's existing witch fire routine boosts z3 by +8 for 30s — mirror that window with a -8 duck on z1. If interference persists during the witch's listening phase, increase to 12 dB.
